title: selaginella × neomexicana
intro: Selaginella × neomexicana is a rare, sterile hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between the Selaginella lepidophylla and Selaginella watsonii. It is also known as the "living resurrection plant" due to its ability to revive itself after drying out. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Selaginella × neomexicana can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable resource for those seeking natural remedies and health benefits, such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
